slug_convention: The :latest tag is the default for any model and MUST be omitted from model names and slugs. Only explicit non-default tags (e.g. :14b, :q8_0, :bf16) are included.

backend_notes.qwen3.5:35b-a3b-q2_k_l: Runs via llama-server/OpenAI-compatible API on this host. Ollama 0.17.8-rc4 still fails to load qwen35moe.
backend_notes.omnicoder:9b-q4_k_m: Benchmarked via llama-server/OpenAI-compatible API on this host. Ollama 0.17.8-rc4 imports it, but local runner allocation fails on this machine.
backend_notes.qwen3.5:27b-claude-4.6-opus-reasoning-di: Benchmarked via llama-server/OpenAI-compatible API on this host. Ollama 0.17.8-rc4 imports it, but local runner cannot load qwen35.
Benchmarked via llama-server/OpenAI-compatible API on this host. This smaller follow-up quant improves memory use and speed versus Q3_K_M, but still only scores 1/5 on the quick suite.
backend_notes.zac/phi4-tools: T5500 Ollama 0.18.1: 31.86 tok/s, 2/5 quality. Previously failed on 0.18.0.
backend_notes.qwen3.5:27b-claude-4.6-opus-reasoning-di: Ollama 0.18.1 cannot load 27B qwen35 architecture on T5500 (unknown model architecture error). 9B variant works.
backend_notes.qwen3.5:9b: T5500 champion tier: 38.87 tok/s, 5/5 quality, 8.2GB VRAM, PPL 3.89 on Ollama 0.18.1.
backend_notes.qwen3.5:4b: T5500 best value: 55.66 tok/s, 5/5 quality, 5.73GB VRAM, PPL 4.62 on Ollama 0.18.1.
backend_notes.qwen3:8b: T5500: 48.65 tok/s, 5/5 quality on Ollama 0.18.1. Failed on 0.18.0.
backend_notes.cogito:14b: Framework: 4.3 tok/s GPU (partial offload — 9GB exceeds VRAM headroom), 5/5 quality. Framework No-GPU: 2.4 tok/s. Barely faster with GPU due to partial offload; T5500 best PPL: 34.36 tok/s, 5/5, 9.05GB VRAM.
backend_notes.mistral-small-4: 119B MoE (128 experts, 4 active, 6.5B active/token). Not yet on Ollama library — use llama-server with bartowski GGUF. Framework (96GB RAM + 12GB VRAM): Q3_K_M (54.6GB) is the sweet spot; Q4_K_M (72.6GB) fits tight; IQ4_XS (63.8GB) is a good middle ground. T5500 (36GB RAM + 12GB VRAM): only IQ1 quants fit, too lossy to be meaningful.
backend_notes.nemotron-3-nano:4b: Framework GPU champion: 84.3 tok/s, 5/5 quality, ~3GB VRAM, 0.41s load, 256K context. Coding: composite 0.078 (L2 38/158, L3 3/20) — ties gemma3:12b, rank 4/9 on Framework leaderboard. TurboQuant TQ3 needed to use full 256K context (9.6GB KV at 256K would exceed 12GB without it).
backend_notes.nemotron-cascade-2: T5500: cannot load. MoE 30B-A3B model needs 22.6 GiB system memory; T5500 has 36GB RAM + 12GB VRAM but only ~22.4 GiB available after OS/CUDA overhead. Even smallest HF quant (IQ1_S) is 18GB due to MoE floor. Crashes Ollama service on load attempt. Strix-only (5/5, 27.83 tok/s there).
backend_notes.sam860/LFM2:2.6b: Framework GPU: 52.1 tok/s (via LFM2-2.6b-tools), 3/5 quality. Framework No-GPU: 2.9 tok/s. Template fix in models/LFM2-2.6b-tools.Modelfile raises tool_pass 0→1/2.
backend_notes.gemma3:12b: Framework GPU: 36.1 tok/s (via gemma3-12b-tools), 4/5 quality. Framework No-GPU: 1.7 tok/s. Default Ollama template lacks tool handling (2/5, tool 0/2). Template fix in models/gemma3-12b-tools.Modelfile raises to 4/5. Applies to all gemma3 sizes.
backend_notes.cogito:8b: Framework GPU champion: 61.6 tok/s, 5/5 quality, 4.9GB VRAM — fits fully in 12GB RTX 3060. Framework No-GPU: 2.5 tok/s. Best balance of quality and speed with eGPU.
backend_notes.ministral-3:14b: Framework GPU: 3.0 tok/s, No-GPU: 3.2 tok/s — GPU offload overhead actually hurts at this size (9.1GB exceeds 12GB VRAM headroom). Fastest CPU-only option of tested models. T5500: 5/5 quality.
backend_notes.rnj-1:8b: Framework GPU: 51.7 tok/s, 5.1GB VRAM. Framework No-GPU: 2.8 tok/s.
backend_notes.gemma4: Framework GPU: 15.32 tok/s, 4/5 quality, 6.0GB VRAM, 0.48s load. MoE e4b (9.6GB model). Strix Coding L3 (think:true): 28/50 (0.545). Think:false run in progress. Tools work natively. Requires Ollama 0.20.0-rc1+.
backend_notes.gemma4:e2b: Framework GPU speed champion: 89.12 tok/s, 4/5 quality, 9.09GB VRAM (fully GPU, Q4_K_M), 0.47s load. MoE 2.3B effective. Coding L3: 4/20 (0.217). Beats nemotron-3-nano:4b on speed (84.3) with same quality tier.
backend_notes.gemma4:26b: Framework: 8.81 tok/s, 5/5 quality, 10.7GB VRAM (partial offload — 22.9GB model). MoE 3.8B active/25.2B total. Strix Coding L3 (think:true): 32/50 (0.636). Think:false run in progress.
backend_notes.gemma4:31b: Framework: 1.51 tok/s, 5/5 quality, 11.1GB VRAM (partial offload — 34.9GB dense model, 25GB RAM peak). Strix: 9.36 tok/s (think:true), Coding L3 (think:true): 45/50 (0.891) — #1 overall. Think:false run in progress. 31.3B dense Q4_K_M.
backend_notes.devstral-small-2: 24B coding/SE agent model (Mistral). Strix candidate — fits comfortably in 128GB unified memory.
backend_notes.nemotron-3-super: Strix: Coding L3 36/50 (0.727) — #4. 86GB model, 28%/72% CPU/GPU split (93GB loaded). 120B MoE 12B active. Strong finish — last 20 tasks 19/20 PASS. Uses temperature=1.0. Failed early tasks (aspnet_oneof, efcore_leftjoin, masstransit_statemachine/test_harness, xunit tasks) but swept EF Core 33-36, MassTransit 37-39, all Blazor, vertical, and patterns tasks.
backend_notes.glm-5:cloud: Ollama cloud (provider: Zhipu AI). 744B total / 40B active MoE. 198K context. Coding L3: 18/20 (0.913) — new overall champion. Only failed masstransit_test_harness and xunit_assembly_fixture.
backend_notes.minimax-m2.7:cloud: Ollama cloud (provider: MiniMax). Latest M2-series. Coding L3: 14/20 (0.652). Strong on ASP.NET/EF Core/Blazor basics, weaker on vertical integration tasks.
backend_notes.cogito-2.1:671b-cloud: Ollama cloud (provider: Essential AI). 671B, MIT-licensed. Coding L3: 13/20 (0.652). Interesting failure pattern — fails some basics (aspnet_oneof, efcore_json) but passes harder tasks (masstransit_test_harness, vertical_blazor_crud).
backend_notes.deepseek-v3.2:cloud: Ollama cloud (provider: DeepSeek). 685B MoE, ~37B active. Coding L3 (20-task): 16/20 (0.826). NOT runnable locally — smallest GGUF is 161GB (unsloth UD-TQ1_0), exceeds 128GB. Cloud-only on Ollama.
backend_notes.hf.co/Intel/Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct-250: Strix candidate. Qwen3 235B MoE (22B active). Intel AutoRound mixed quant: 8-bit embeddings + 4-bit non-expert + 2-bit expert layers = 79.8GB. Fits Strix 128GB unified memory with ~48GB headroom for KV cache. Not yet tested.
backend_notes.hf.co/Jackrong/Qwopus3.5-9B-v3-GGUF:Q8_0: Framework: fails to load on Ollama 0.20.0-rc1 (qwen3.5 arch blob error). Via llama-server (llama.cpp b8645 CUDA 12.4): 14.7 tok/s, 3/5 quality (coding 0/2, tools 2/2, agentic 1/1), 9.77GB VRAM. Coding L3 not available (requires Ollama native API). Reasoning distill based on qwen3.5:9b.
backend_notes.gpt-oss:120b: Strix: Coding L3 43/50 (0.873) — tied #1 with qwen3-coder-next and glm-5:cloud. 65GB model, 100% GPU on Strix with OLLAMA_GPU_MEMORY=120G. Failed: efcore_leftjoin, xunit_assembly_fixture, linq_complex_query, async_semaphore_throttle, async_valuetask_cache, aspnet_minimal_api_endpoint, xunit_async_collection.
backend_notes.hf.co/mradermacher/Qwen3-235B-A22B-ablit: Strix: 85GB model, 24%/76% CPU/GPU split. Qwen3 235B MoE (22B active), i1-Q2_K quant. Very slow (~7 min/task). L3 benchmark in progress. Q2_K quality significantly degrades code generation — 50% pass rate at task 13. The abliterated (uncensored) variant is not optimal for coding benchmarks.
backend_notes.hf.co/bartowski/stepfun-ai_Step-3.5-Flas: BLOCKED: Ollama 0.20.2 does not support Step-3.5-Flash architecture (GitHub issue #14043, llama.cpp PRs merged but not in Ollama yet). 48GB IQ2_XXS downloaded, 500 error on load. 197B MoE (11B active), Apache 2.0. StepFun official Q4_K_S (111GB) explicitly targets 128GB unified memory (AMD Ryzen AI Max+ 395). REAP pruned variant (149B/11B) available at Q4_K_S 85GB. Needs llama-server or Ollama update.
backend_notes.hf.co/unsloth/gemma-4-31B-it-GGUF:UD-IQ2: Framework candidate. 31B dense, Unsloth Dynamic IQ2_XXS = 8.5GB. Fits fully in 12GB GPU. Testing if IQ2 quality holds for code generation.
Framework candidate. 31B dense, Unsloth Dynamic IQ2_M = 10.8GB. Tight fit in 12GB GPU. Better quality than IQ2_XXS.
backend_notes.hf.co/TeichAI/gemma-4-31B-it-Claude-Opus: Strix candidate. 31B dense fine-tuned with Claude Opus reasoning data. Q4_K_M = ~18GB. Too large for Framework GPU but fits Strix 128GB easily. May outperform base gemma4:31b on coding tasks.
backend_notes.qwen3.6: T5500 Ollama 0.20.7: FAILS TO LOAD. Architecture qwen35moe panics with "index out of range [0] with length 0" at ggml.go:276 for 35B variant — same bug as qwen3.5:27b/35b. Small qwen35moe (4b, 9b) load fine; large 35B does not. Q4_K_M = 24GB downloaded and registered manually (registry TLS intermittent). Bug likely in Ollama ggml backend tensor handling for large MoE configs.
